default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review and refine Looker dashboards for various clients, addressing URL matching issues and dashboard presentation.](https://fathom.video/share/7kMKcc9zzHi3NxzPTD4yQKzRyS8RAL2w?tab=summary&timestamp=15.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Change regex contains to regex match in Google Search Console (GSC) data for more accurate URL matching](https://fathom.video/share/7kMKcc9zzHi3NxzPTD4yQKzRyS8RAL2w?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
  - [Update Looker dashboard links in the Notion database to ensure MEs access correct reports](https://fathom.video/share/7kMKcc9zzHi3NxzPTD4yQKzRyS8RAL2w?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
  - [Remove conditional formatting colors from tables for better visibility](https://fathom.video/share/7kMKcc9zzHi3NxzPTD4yQKzRyS8RAL2w?tab=summary&timestamp=1629.0)
  - [Collaborate with Isra to manage publishing workload during peak times (Thursdays/Fridays)](https://fathom.video/share/7kMKcc9zzHi3NxzPTD4yQKzRyS8RAL2w?tab=summary&timestamp=1352.0)

## Topics

### URL Matching in Looker Dashboards

  - [Identified issue with regex contains potentially causing broad matches](https://fathom.video/share/7kMKcc9zzHi3NxzPTD4yQKzRyS8RAL2w?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
  - [Decided to change GSC data to use regex match for more precise URL matching](https://fathom.video/share/7kMKcc9zzHi3NxzPTD4yQKzRyS8RAL2w?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [EMIs responsible for providing correct URLs in Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/7kMKcc9zzHi3NxzPTD4yQKzRyS8RAL2w?tab=summary&timestamp=549.0)
  - [Action: Update all client dashboards to use regex match for GSC data](https://fathom.video/share/7kMKcc9zzHi3NxzPTD4yQKzRyS8RAL2w?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)

### Dashboard Presentation and Accessibility

  - [Removed dark red conditional formatting colors from URL Flux and Delta tables](https://fathom.video/share/7kMKcc9zzHi3NxzPTD4yQKzRyS8RAL2w?tab=summary&timestamp=1629.0)
  - [Updated Looker dashboard links in Notion database to prevent confusion](https://fathom.video/share/7kMKcc9zzHi3NxzPTD4yQKzRyS8RAL2w?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
  - [Deleted irrelevant data sources (e.g., DataGrid from Flossom dashboard)](https://fathom.video/share/7kMKcc9zzHi3NxzPTD4yQKzRyS8RAL2w?tab=summary&timestamp=2111.0)
  - [Action: Ensure all MEs receive the instructional video for using Looker dashboards](https://fathom.video/share/7kMKcc9zzHi3NxzPTD4yQKzRyS8RAL2w?tab=summary&timestamp=2180.0)

### Publishing Workflow Management

  - [Discussed challenges with high volume of publishing requests on Thursdays/Fridays](https://fathom.video/share/7kMKcc9zzHi3NxzPTD4yQKzRyS8RAL2w?tab=summary&timestamp=1329.0)
  - [Suggested collaboration with Isra to distribute workload during peak times](https://fathom.video/share/7kMKcc9zzHi3NxzPTD4yQKzRyS8RAL2w?tab=summary&timestamp=1352.0)
  - [Action: Sulaman to connect with Isra to establish a workload-sharing system](https://fathom.video/share/7kMKcc9zzHi3NxzPTD4yQKzRyS8RAL2w?tab=summary&timestamp=1352.0)

### Linear Template Creation

  - [Sulaman seeking guidance on creating and using templates in Linear](https://fathom.video/share/7kMKcc9zzHi3NxzPTD4yQKzRyS8RAL2w?tab=summary&timestamp=956.0)
  - [Vivek unsure about the process; suggested consulting with Andy](https://fathom.video/share/7kMKcc9zzHi3NxzPTD4yQKzRyS8RAL2w?tab=summary&timestamp=974.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Update all GSC data in Looker dashboards to use regex match](https://fathom.video/share/7kMKcc9zzHi3NxzPTD4yQKzRyS8RAL2w?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
